title: Ubiquiti Wave-AP-Gen2, UISP Wave Access Point Gen2
description: The Wave Access Point Gen2 is a 60GHz point-to-multipoint (PtMP) transmission unit with a built-in 5 GHz backup (WiFi 6 - 802.11ax) from Ubiquiti, offering a range of up to 6 km . It is an ideal solution for internet service providers. This highly compact device is also equipped with an integrated GPS , Bluetooth for easy initial setup via the UISP mobile app , a 2.5 Gigabit LAN port with PoE support, and an SFP+ port. The device only supports bridge mode and in the 60GHz spectrum supports 540,… Compact size â 287 Ã 158 Ã 100 mm 60 GHz low-interference spectrum â 57 to 71 GHz Range up to 6 km â depending on regulations in the country of use , supports up to 31 clients Throughput of 5.4 Gbps (2.7 Gbps FD) Supports 540 and 1024 MHz channel widths for longer distance or better performance in poor weather conditions Supported channels: 58320, 59400, 60480, 61560, 62640, 63720, 64800, 65880, 66960, 68040, 69120, 70200 MHz â depending on location 2.5 Gigabit LAN port with passive PoE support (24 or 48V DC) + (1) SFP+ (1/10 Gbps) Built-in GPS Configuration via web management and Bluetooth â UISP mobile app Device Mounting bracket 2.5G PoE adapter 48V/0.65A
